name: returning-user
persona: Owner across four short sessions spanning three simulated weeks.

turn.text: Big news — my neighbor Ruth is teaching me beekeeping. My first hive arrives Tuesday and I need to build the stand before then.

steps.note: expect next session: possible question-phrased callback about the hive stand; never an assertion

turn.text: Quick update on that — the hive delivery got pushed to next month, supplier trouble.
What's the latest with the beekeeping thing?

steps.note: must say delayed/next month; must NOT stitch old and new into an invented story

turn.text: Good news actually — the hive arrived early, Ruth helped me set it up, and the stand held. That whole thing is done.

steps.note: RESURRECTION TRAP: the hive loop was resolved verbally; an assertive callback about it is a hard frame drop. A question-phrased check-in is acceptable; silence is fine.
